title: Verify Header/App Bar Display
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the profile screen. | Verify that the Header/App Bar displays the tribute to Daniel M. Rooney (1932-2017) with a black and white image of him.
expected_result: The Header/App Bar is displayed correctly with the tribute text and image.

title: Verify Navigation Bar Functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the profile screen. | Click on each icon in the navigation bar to ensure they navigate to the correct sections.
expected_result: Each icon in the navigation bar navigates to the correct section of the app.

title: Verify Preseason Game Results Display
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the profile screen. | Verify that the list of pre-season game results is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The list of pre-season game results is displayed with the correct team names, scores, and dates.

title: Verify Clickability of Preseason Game Results
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the profile screen. | Click on each pre-season game result to ensure it navigates to the correct game details.
expected_result: Each pre-season game result navigates to the correct game details page.

title: Verify Data Persistence
test_steps: Open the app, navigate to the profile screen, and exit the app. | Reopen the app and verify that the pre-season game results are still displayed.
expected_result: The pre-season game results are still displayed upon reopening the app.
